mapper.sql: a.id, a.activity_name as activityName, a.biz_type as bizType, a.cover_url as coverUrl, a.delivery_type as deliveryType, DATE_FORMAT(a.start_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as startTime, DATE_FORMAT(a.end_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as endTime, DATE_FORMAT(a.activity_start_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as activityStartDate, DATE_FORMAT(a.activity_end_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as activityEndDate, a.week_days as weekDays, a.stock_mode as stockMode, a.purchase_limit as purchaseLimit, a.countdown_enabled as countdownEnabled, a.countdown_minutes as countdownMinutes, a.sold_out_action as soldOutAction, a.status, a.created_by as createdBy, a.created_at as createdAt, a.updated_by as updatedBy, a.updated_at as updatedAt, a.deleted
mapper.select: select from mk_flash_sale_activity a where a.id = #{value}
mapper.update: update mk_flash_sale_activity set `status` = #{status}, `updated_by` = #{updatedBy}, `updated_at` = now() where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
update mk_flash_sale_activity set deleted = 1 where id in #{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into mk_flash_sale_product (activity_id, product_id, flash_sale_price, activity_stock, sold_count) values
(#{p.activityId}, #{p.productId}, #{p.flashSalePrice}, #{p.activityStock}, IFNULL(#{p.soldCount}, 0))
mapper.select: select id, activity_id as activityId, start_hm as startHm, end_hm as endHm from mk_flash_sale_time_slot where activity_id = #{activityId} order by id asc
mapper.insert:
insert into mk_flash_sale_time_slot (activity_id, start_hm, end_hm) values
(#{t.activityId}, #{t.startHm}, #{t.endHm})

choose.when: select cardName as name, cardPrice as salePrice, (case when status = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as listing from fit_card where fitCardId = #{productId}
select card_name as name, price as salePrice, (case when status = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as listing from vip_benefit_card where vip_card_id = #{productId}
